languages.original_text: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

languages.text: "Следовательно, впереди нас ждет опаснейшее сплетение реального с ирреальным, требующее крайней осмотрительности. Нунциус, экранируй внешние вокс-писцы и будь готов вести запись по моей команде".

"Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."
languages.original_text: "Следовательно, впереди нас ждет опаснейшее сплетение реального с ирреальным, требующее крайней осмотрительности. Нунциус, экранируй внешние вокс-писцы и будь готов вести запись по моей команде".

traits.locale_text: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

"Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

"Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

languages.text: «A consecuencia, tenemos una peligrosísima unión de lo real con lo irreal más adelante, por lo que debemos actuar con la máxima cautela. Nuncius, proteja a los excribas de voco externos y prepárese para grabar a mi orden».
languages.original_text: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

traits.locale_text: «A consecuencia, tenemos una peligrosísima unión de lo real con lo irreal más adelante, por lo que debemos actuar con la máxima cautela. Nuncius, proteja a los excribas de voco externos y prepárese para grabar a mi orden».

languages.text: 「したがって、我々の前途には、現実と非現実のきわめて危険な絡み合いが待ち受けており、最大限の警戒を要します。ヌンキウス、外部のヴォックス・スクライブを遮蔽し、私の合図で記録できるよう備えてください」
languages.original_text: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

traits.locale_text: 「したがって、我々の前途には、現実と非現実のきわめて危険な絡み合いが待ち受けており、最大限の警戒を要します。ヌンキウス、外部のヴォックス・スクライブを遮蔽し、私の合図で記録できるよう備えてください」

languages.text: “也就是说，我们面对的是现实与幻象最危险的纠缠，必须极度谨慎。努恩修斯，关闭外部音阵通讯器，等我下令再开始记录。”
languages.original_text: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

traits.locale_text: “也就是说，我们面对的是现实与幻象最危险的纠缠，必须极度谨慎。努恩修斯，关闭外部音阵通讯器，等我下令再开始记录。”

languages.text: "Folglich haben wir eine überaus gefährliche Verstrickung von Realität und Irrealität vor uns, die äußerster Vorsicht bedarf. Nuncius, schirmt die externen Voxschreiber ab und startet auf mein Kommando die Aufzeichnung."
languages.original_text: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

traits.locale_text: "Folglich haben wir eine überaus gefährliche Verstrickung von Realität und Irrealität vor uns, die äußerster Vorsicht bedarf. Nuncius, schirmt die externen Voxschreiber ab und startet auf mein Kommando die Aufzeichnung."

languages.text: « En conséquence, le réel et l'irréel vont s'entremêler, ce qui requerra la plus grande prudence. Nuncius, protège les scribes-vox externes et tiens-toi prêt à enregistrer à mon signal. »
languages.original_text: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."

traits.locale_text: « En conséquence, le réel et l'irréel vont s'entremêler, ce qui requerra la plus grande prudence. Nuncius, protège les scribes-vox externes et tiens-toi prêt à enregistrer à mon signal. »

languages.text: "Sonuç olarak önümüzde son derece dikkat gerektiren, gerçekle gerçek dışının en tehlikeli dolanıklığı var. Nuncius, haricî voks kâtiplerini kalkanla koru ve emrimle kayıt yapmaya hazır ol."
languages.original_text: "Consequently, we have a most dangerous entanglement of the real with the unreal ahead of us, requiring extreme caution. Nuncius, shield the external vox-scribes and be ready to record on my command."
